description: PR3 scenario #10 — schema stability when trace capture is disabled. With TIMETABLE_PR3_DECISION_TRACE_ENABLED=False, the planner result must still include the decision_trace key equal to {} so downstream consumers can count on a stable payload shape regardless of flag state. Warm-start metrics (changes_from_baseline_count etc.) still populate normally.
notes: Per the ChatGPT DoR amendment: 'if trace is disabled, planner payload still includes decision_trace key with {} for schema stability.'
